/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libnavigation_components__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libnavigation_components__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/navigation_components__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/navigation_components/action/navigate__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ubuntu/ros_ws/src/assignment1_rt2/navigation_components/build/navigation_components:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libnavigation_components__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
